mega8Boundary: Revenue B2B only; no Capital Command Center, Market OS, Ambassadors, Campaign Lifecycle or SEO Blog federation.

truthBoundary.stableVersion: 1.0.0 only after deployed live acceptance, migration validation, telemetry, rollback rehearsal and approval

scopes.name: Account Command Launchpad
persistence: existing B2B and Revenue Command tables
scopes.acceptance: Authorized existing accounts are searchable and only mapped accounts can establish canonical context.

scopes.name: Canonical Commercial Data Bridge
scopes.acceptance: Dry-run, conflicts, safe backfill and run-scoped rollback preserve owners, territories and historical IDs without parallel CRM.

scopes.name: Persistent Commercial Context
scopes.acceptance: Account, opportunity, contact, partner, contract, site, meeting, proposal, issue, renewal and scan context survive extension lifecycle transitions.

scopes.name: Guided Revenue Journey
persistence: existing evidence, committee, opportunity, proposal, pricing, closing, payment and partner lifecycle records
scopes.acceptance: Prospect, opportunity and partner journeys expose current step, blockers, evidence and next action from persisted facts.

scopes.name: Contact and Buying Committee Intelligence
scopes.acceptance: Public contacts and buying roles retain verification state; guessed identity is never verified automatically.

scopes.name: Vertical Commercial Doctrines
scopes.acceptance: Six verticals use distinct signals, questions, roles, offers, pricing hypotheses, risks and readiness gates.

scopes.name: Governed Evidence-bound AI
scopes.acceptance: Provider-neutral structured output requires evidence IDs; disabled or failed provider returns truthful deterministic fallback.

scopes.name: Opportunity and Pipeline Reality
scopes.acceptance: Real stages, next actions, closing/payment gates and false-won protection are preserved and surfaced by journey/data quality.

scopes.name: Daily Revenue Execution
scopes.acceptance: Priorities, overdue work, meetings, proposals, payments, partner risk and missing data are generated from real records.

scopes.name: Communications Calls Meetings Field
persistence: existing communication, call, meeting, field visit and follow-up tables
scopes.acceptance: All external communication remains user-confirmed and outcomes create auditable next steps.

scopes.name: Proposal Pricing Negotiation Closing
persistence: existing proposal, pricing, negotiation, closing, contract and payment tables
scopes.acceptance: Verbal interest cannot become won; margin, approval, contract and verified payment gates remain enforced.

scopes.name: Partner Operations Integration
scopes.acceptance: Revenue partnerships enter pending handoff only; exact operational links are authoritative, name matches remain review candidates, and activation/payment/delivery remain human/governance gated.

scopes.name: Territory Management Reporting
scopes.acceptance: Portfolio reports expose missing sources, mapping gaps, quality risks and evidence timestamps.

scopes.name: Real Automation Scheduler
scopes.acceptance: Low-risk jobs use locks, idempotency, retry/backoff, rate limits, pause/kill switch and history; high-risk actions are unsupported.

scopes.name: Workflow UX Reconstruction
persistence: server context plus extension workspace v9
scopes.acceptance: The side panel begins with discovery/search/resume and explains empty, error, success, blocker and next-step states.

scopes.name: Unified Timeline and Data Quality
scopes.acceptance: Timeline aggregates source records and quality issues retain severity, owner, correction, evidence and resolution history.
